summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AutoDamageIQ SAM calibration improvements. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified SAM measurements display correctly with cm values, type factors, and size bands.
seed_data_creation: Test analyses created during testing using /app/assets/crash_*.jpg images
context_for_next_testing_agent: SAM calibration improvements are fully functional. Key changes verified: (1) Panel-calibrated measurements with bbox_width_cm, bbox_height_cm, damage_area_cm2, (2) Type factors applied correctly (scratch=0.10, dent=0.45, etc.), (3) BBox ratio analysis with effective_ratio and relative_size, (4) Image ratio analysis with approx_area_cm2, (5) Size band reflects calibrated values, (6) SAM limit of max 5 damages working. Frontend displays all SAM measurements correctly.

sam_status_endpoint.returns: library_installed, checkpoint_exists, checkpoint_path, checkpoint_size_mb, model_type, model_loaded, device

sam_calibrated_measurements.returns: primary (method, bbox_width_cm, bbox_height_cm, damage_area_cm2, type_factor, panel_reference), bbox_analysis (effective_ratio, relative_size), image_analysis (approx_area_cm2, size_band)

ui_features_verified.anomaly_signals: PASS - Shows anomaly score and signals

sam_calibration_info.panel_dimensions: 23 panels with physical dimensions in cm (e.g., back_bumper: 180x50 cm)
sam_calibration_info.type_factors: 6 damage types with area reduction factors
